sglang.title: Backend method not found when SRT Runtime is used
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

import sglang as sgl
from sglang.utils import http_request

model_path = "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct"

if __name__ == "__main__":
    runtime = sgl.Runtime(model_path=model_path)
    sgl.set_default_backend(runtime)

    sgl.flush_cache()

    runtime.shutdown()
=== Result ===

sglang.title: Support min_tokens in sgl.gen
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Fix #1564. Currently, the frontend (SglSamplingParams) and backend (SamplingParams) SamplingParams are not consistent. The frontend one does not expose min_new_tokens. This PR adds necessary fields to the frontend to enable min_new_tokens be passed to the backend
Modifications

Context
T

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Deprecate registration of custom configs to huggingface
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
vLLM now has the following code to handle custom configs, so we no longer need to register them to huggingface. Removing config registration will avoid changing the behavior of huggingface
       if model_type in _CONFIG_REGISTRY:
            config_class = _CONFIG_REGISTRY[model_type]
            c

vllm.title: [Frontend] API support for beam search
vllm.author: LunrEclipse
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added support for running a higher layer of beam search across openai API server without frontend multiprocessing.
This PR is a continuation of the existing beam search refactors found here and here.
Manually testing conducted to verify that requests are still ran in parallel and output is correct.
